name: Vs fun gang | Vessel user
description:
======================

* YOU block the way.

* Looks like Fun ends here.

=========================

ㅤ

Here we go, I was looking for this kind of bot for some time, but remembered that I can just do it myself.

I tried at least.

ㅤ

in short: you as a soul left Kris and finally received your own body. Other members of the fun gang was shocked, Kris does not forgive their experiences with you, also you was considered as a threat, don't ask why, figure out the reason for yourselves. The fact is that fun gang going to have a bad time. (maybe)

I want to add scenario when player did Weird route, but I'm not sure how to make it, so It would be really nice if you gave me some ideas.

PROXIES RECOMMENDED, I MEAN LOOK AT THE TOKEN AMOUNT
